text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
A long, long time ago... there lived an old man
and an old woman.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
One day, the woman went down to the river to do
the washing... But then, from the river... Slish,
swosh... slish...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower and Zenno Rob Roy
Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is just some normal fairy tale, right? The
atmosphere you're creating is kind of... off...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
S-s-surely it's her unique way of speaking. The
splashing sounds were especially well done!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's harder than it seems. I've never heard the
exact sound, after all...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's understandable! Like, there's a certain
flowiness to slish, swosh in my head!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Pay it no mind. I was just agreeing that Rice's
"slish swosh" sounded really cute.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My friend is here with us, you see...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower and Zenno Rob Roy
